name: Citrus Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup hot chili sauce or red pepper sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the orange, grapefruit, lime, and lemon.
2. Cut each fruit into segments over a large stainless steel bowl to catch excess juices.
3. Carefully dice the fruit segments without crushing them.
4. Add the oil, vinegar, soy sauce, and chili sauce to the fruit juices in the bowl.
5. Whisk everything together until well blended.
6. Stir in the peppercorns, ginger, cilantro, diced fruit pieces, and salt (if using).
7. This recipe makes about 1 1/4 cups of vinaigrette.
